/var/log/aws/security-group.describe.content:
# aws ec2 describe-security-groups --group-ids sg-0a1b2c3d
# captured 2025-01-15 14:10 UTC
GroupId: sg-0a1b2c3d
GroupName: polaris-app-sg
VpcId: vpc-abc123
IpPermissions:
  - FromPort: 22
    ToPort: 22
    IpProtocol: tcp
    IpRanges:
      - CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        Description: bastion subnet
  - FromPort: 443
    ToPort: 443
    IpProtocol: tcp
    IpRanges:
      - CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        Description: public https
  - FromPort: 8080
    ToPort: 8080
    IpProtocol: tcp
    IpRanges:
      - CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        Description: public app listener
IpPermissionsEgress:
  - IpProtocol: -1
    IpRanges:
      - CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        Description: allow all outbound

/var/log/aws/network-acl.describe.content:
# aws ec2 describe-network-acls --filters Name=vpc-id,Values=vpc-abc123
# captured 2025-01-15 14:10 UTC
NetworkAclId: acl-9988aabb
VpcId: vpc-abc123
IsDefault: false
Entries:
  # Ingress rules (lowest rule-number wins)
  - RuleNumber: 100
    RuleAction: allow
    Egress: false
    Protocol: tcp
    PortRange: { From: 22,   To: 22   }
    CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
  - RuleNumber: 110
    RuleAction: allow
    Egress: false
    Protocol: tcp
    PortRange: { From: 443,  To: 443  }
    CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
  - RuleNumber: 120
    RuleAction: allow
    Egress: false
    Protocol: tcp
    PortRange: { From: 8080, To: 8080 }
    CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
  # Egress rules
  - RuleNumber: 100
    RuleAction: allow
    Egress: true
    Protocol: tcp
    PortRange: { From: 80,   To: 80   }
    CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
  - RuleNumber: 110
    RuleAction: allow
    Egress: true
    Protocol: tcp
    PortRange: { From: 443,  To: 443  }
    CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
